obtain ⟨φ, hφ_meas, h_eqY⟩ : ∃ φ, Measurable φ ∧ Y' = φ ∘ Y := hY_meas.exists_eq_measurable_comp
  obtain ⟨ψ, hψ_meas, h_eqZ⟩ : ∃ ψ, Measurable ψ ∧ Z' = ψ ∘ Z := hZ_meas.exists_eq_measurable_comp
  rw [h_eqY, h_eqZ]
  exact h_indep.comp hφ_meas hψ_meas

lemma CondIndepFun.of_measurable_left
    (h_indep : Y ⟂ᵢ[X, hX; μ] Z) (hY_meas : Measurable[mγ.comap Y] Y') :
    Y' ⟂ᵢ[X, hX; μ] Z := by
  obtain ⟨φ, hφ_meas, h_eqY⟩ : ∃ φ, Measurable φ ∧ Y' = φ ∘ Y := hY_meas.exists_eq_measurable_comp
  rw [h_eqY]
  exact h_indep.comp hφ_meas measurable_id

lemma CondIndepFun.of_measurable_right
    (h_indep : Y ⟂ᵢ[X, hX; μ] Z) (hZ_meas : Measurable[mδ.comap Z] Z') :
    Y ⟂ᵢ[X, hX; μ] Z' := by
  obtain ⟨ψ, hψ_meas, h_eqZ⟩ : ∃ ψ, Measurable ψ ∧ Z' = ψ ∘ Z := hZ_meas.exists_eq_measurable_comp
  rw [h_eqZ]
  exact h_indep.comp measurable_id hψ_meas

end ProbabilityTheory

namespace Bandits

variable {α Ω : Type*} {mα : MeasurableSpace α} {mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω} [DecidableEq α]
  [StandardBorelSpace α] [Nonempty α]
  {A : ℕ → Ω → α} {R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ} {P : Measure Ω} [IsProbabilityMeasure P]
  {alg : Algorithm α ℝ} {ν : Kernel α ℝ} [IsMarkovKernel ν]
  {h_inter : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P}

local notation "𝔓'" => P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)

omit [DecidableEq α] [StandardBorelSpace α] [Nonempty α] in
lemma hasLaw_Z (a : α) (m : ℕ) :
  HasLaw (fun ω ↦ ω.2 m a) (ν a) 𝔓' where
  map_eq := by
    calc (𝔓').map (fun ω ↦ ω.2 m a)
    _ = ((𝔓').snd).map (fun ω ↦ ω m a) := by
      rw [Measure.snd, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
      rfl
    _ = (Bandit.streamMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ ω m a) := by simp
    _ = ((Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν).map (fun ω ↦ ω m)).map
        (fun ω ↦ ω a) := by
      rw [Bandit.streamMeasure, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
      rfl
    _ = ν a := by simp_rw [(measurePreserving_eval_infinitePi _ _).map_eq]

/-- Law of `Y` conditioned on the event `s`.-/
notation "𝓛[" Y " | " s "; " μ "]" => Measure.map Y (μ[|s])
/-- Law of `Y` conditioned on the event that `X` is in `s`. -/
notation "𝓛[" Y " | " X " in " s "; " μ "]" => Measure.map Y (μ[|X ⁻¹' s])
/-- Law of `Y` conditioned on the event that `X` equals `x`. -/
notation "𝓛[" Y " | " X " ← " x "; " μ "]" => Measure.map Y (μ[|X ⁻¹' {x}])

local notation "𝔓t" => Bandit.trajMeasure alg ν
local notation "𝔓" => Bandit.measure alg ν

omit [DecidableEq α] in
lemma condDistrib_reward'' [StandardBorelSpace Ω] [Nonempty Ω] [Countable α]
    (h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P) (n : ℕ) :
    𝓛[fun ω ↦ R n ω.1 | fun ω ↦ A n ω.1; 𝔓'] =ᵐ[(𝔓').map (fun ω ↦ A n ω.1)] ν := by
  have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  have h_ra' : 𝓛[fun ω ↦ R n ω.1 | fun ω ↦ A n ω.1; P] =ᵐ[P.map (A n)] ν := h.condDistrib_reward_stationaryEnv n
  have h_law : (𝔓').map (fun ω ↦ A n ω.1) = P.map (A n) := by
    change ((𝔓').map (A n ∘ Prod.fst)) = _
    rw [← Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), ← Measure.fst, Measure.fst_prod]
  rw [h_law]
  have h_prod : 𝓛[fun ω ↦ R n ω.1 | fun ω ↦ A n ω.1; 𝔓']
      =ᵐ[(P.map (A n))] 𝓛[fun ω ↦ R n ω.1 | fun ω ↦ A n ω.1; P] :=
    condDistrib_fst_prod _ (by fun_prop) _
  filter_upwards [h_ra', h_prod] with ω h_eq h_prod
  rw [h_prod, h_eq]

omit [DecidableEq α] in
lemma reward_cond_action [StandardBorelSpace Ω] [Nonempty Ω] [Countable α]
    (h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P) (a : α) (n : ℕ)
    (hμa : (𝔓').map (fun ω ↦ A n ω.1) {a} ≠ 0) :
    𝓛[fun ω ↦ R n ω.1 | fun ω ↦ A n ω.1 ← a; 𝔓'] = ν a := by
  have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  have h_ra : 𝓛[fun ω ↦ R n ω.1 | fun ω ↦ A n ω.1; 𝔓'] =ᵐ[(𝔓').map (fun ω ↦ A n ω.1)] ν :=
    condDistrib_reward'' h n
  have h_eq := condDistrib_ae_eq_cond (μ := 𝔓')
    (X := fun ω ↦ A n ω.1) (Y := fun ω ↦ R n ω.1) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff_of_countable] at h_ra h_eq
  specialize h_ra a hμa
  specialize h_eq a hμa
  rw [h_ra] at h_eq
  exact h_eq.symm

lemma CondIndepFun.of_measurable_left
    (h_indep : Y ⟂ᵢ[X, hX; μ] Z) (hY_meas : Measurable[mγ.comap Y] Y') :
    Y' ⟂ᵢ[X, hX; μ] Z := by
  obtain ⟨φ, hφ_meas, h_eqY⟩ : ∃ φ, Measurable φ ∧ Y' = φ ∘ Y := hY_meas.exists_eq_measurable_comp
  rw [h_eqY]
  exact h_indep.comp hφ_meas measurable_id

lemma CondIndepFun.of_measurable_right
    (h_indep : Y ⟂ᵢ[X, hX; μ] Z) (hZ_meas : Measurable[mδ.comap Z] Z') :
    Y ⟂ᵢ[X, hX; μ] Z' := by
  obtain ⟨ψ, hψ_meas, h_eqZ⟩ : ∃ ψ, Measurable ψ ∧ Z' = ψ ∘ Z := hZ_meas.exists_eq_measurable_comp
  rw [h_eqZ]
  exact h_indep.comp measurable_id hψ_meas

variable {α Ω : Type*} {mα : MeasurableSpace α} {mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω} [DecidableEq α]
  [StandardBorelSpace α] [Nonempty α]
  {A : ℕ → Ω → α} {R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ} {P : Measure Ω} [IsProbabilityMeasure P]
  {alg : Algorithm α ℝ} {ν : Kernel α ℝ} [IsMarkovKernel ν]
  {h_inter : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P}

local notation "𝔓'" => P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)

omit [DecidableEq α] [StandardBorelSpace α] [Nonempty α] in
lemma hasLaw_Z (a : α) (m : ℕ) :
  HasLaw (fun ω ↦ ω.2 m a) (ν a) 𝔓' where
  map_eq := by
    calc (𝔓').map (fun ω ↦ ω.2 m a)
    _ = ((𝔓').snd).map (fun ω ↦ ω m a) := by
      rw [Measure.snd, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
      rfl
    _ = (Bandit.streamMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ ω m a) := by simp
    _ = ((Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν).map (fun ω ↦ ω m)).map
        (fun ω ↦ ω a) := by
      rw [Bandit.streamMeasure, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
      rfl
    _ = ν a := by simp_rw [(measurePreserving_eval_infinitePi _ _).map_eq]

/-- Law of `Y` conditioned on the event `s`. -/
notation "𝓛[" Y " | " s "; " μ "]" => Measure.map Y (μ[|s])
/-- Law of `Y` conditioned on the event that `X` is in `s`. -/
notation "𝓛[" Y " | " X " in " s "; " μ "]" => Measure.map Y (μ[|X ⁻¹' s])
/-- Law of `Y` conditioned on the event that `X` equals `x`. -/
notation "𝓛[" Y " | " X " ← " x "; " μ "]" => Measure.map Y (μ[|X ⁻¹' {x}])

local notation "𝔓t" => Bandit.trajMeasure alg ν
local notation "𝔓" => Bandit.measure alg ν

omit [DecidableEq α] in
lemma condDistrib_reward'' [StandardBorelSpace Ω] [Nonempty Ω] [Countable α]
    (h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P) (n : ℕ) :
    𝓛[fun ω ↦ R n ω.1 | fun ω ↦ A n ω.1; 𝔓'] =ᵐ[(𝔓').map (fun ω ↦ A n ω.1)] ν := by
  have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  have h_ra' : 𝓛[fun ω ↦ R n ω.1 | fun ω ↦ A n ω.1; P] =ᵐ[P.map (A n)] ν := h.condDistrib_reward_stationaryEnv n
  have h_law : (𝔓').map (fun ω ↦ A n ω.1) = P.map (A n) := by
    change ((𝔓').map (A n ∘ Prod.fst)) = _
    rw [← Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), ← Measure.fst, Measure.fst_prod]
  rw [h_law]
  have h_prod : 𝓛[fun ω ↦ R n ω.1 | fun ω ↦ A n ω.1; 𝔓']
      =ᵐ[P.map (A n)] 𝓛[R n | A n; P] :=
    condDistrib_fst_prod _ (by fun_prop) _
  filter_upwards [h_ra', h_prod] with ω h_eq h_prod
  rw [h_prod, h_eq]

      apply IndepFun.add
      exact h4

  specialize h1 n

the definitions, `rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)` depends only on `A`, `R`, `a`, and `n + 1`. The function `fun ω i => rewardByCount A R a (↑i) ω` depends on `A`, `R`, `a`, and `i` for each `i`. The key insight is that these are independent because the definition of `rewardByCount` for `n + 1` is independent of its definition for the indices `i ≤ n`.

This is true because `P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)` is a product measure, and the value at time `n` is determined by the kernel `ν` at time `n`, while the values at times `0, 1, ..., n - 1` are determined by the kernels at those times. Since these are all part of the product measure, they are independent.

```

The value `R n (A n (a))` is the reward at time `n`.

```

- Let `X = rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)`

2. **Understand the structure of the problem:**
   - `X` is the sum of `n+1` terms of the form `R i ω.1`
   - `Y i` is the `i`-th term of this sum (for `i < n+1`)
   - The measure `P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)` is the product measure of `P` and the Markov chain defined by `ν`

3. **Use the property of stationary environments:**
   - Since the environment is stationary, the distribution of the state and reward at any time `t` is the same
   - This implies that the reward at time `n+1` is independent of the rewards at times `0, 1, ..., n`

4. **Formalize the independence:**
   - We can use the fact that `IndepFun` can be shown by proving that the joint distribution is the product of the marginal distributions
   - Alternatively, we can use the property that `X` is a function of `Y` and some independent noise, which would be the case here

To prove this, we need to show that the joint distribution of the past and future rewards factors into the product of the distribution of the past rewards and the distribution of the future reward.

This proof is still too complicated. Let's try a simpler approach.

The goal is `condDistrib (X) (Y) (P) = (C).comp (P.map Y)`, where `X = rewardByCount A R a m`, `Y = fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a m ω.1`, `P = 𝔓'`, and `C = Kernel.const _ (ν a)`.

We know from `condDistrib` definition that `condDistrib X Y P` is `P.map (fun ω ↦ X ω / P.map Y ω)` (in some sense, depending on the exact definition of `condDistrib` and how it handles zero probabilities). But more formally, `condDistrib X Y P` is defined as `P.map (fun ω ↦ X ω | Y ω)`.

In our case, `X = R m` and `Y = fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a m ω.1`. So we need to show:
`P.map (fun ω ↦ R m ω | fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a m ω.1) = (C).comp (P.map (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a m ω.1))`.

Let's use the fact that `R m` is independent of `stepsUntil A a m` given `A m`. This is `condIndepFun_reward_stepsUntil_action'`.

    (h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P) (a : α) (m : ℕ) (hm : m ≠ 0) :
    condDistrib (rewardByCount A R a m) (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a m ω.1) 𝔓'
      =ᵐ[(𝔓').map (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a m ω.1)] Kernel.const _ (ν a) := by
  have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R

    simp [rewardByCount, hA, hR]
    <;> aesop
  rw [h1]
  have h2 : (condDistrib (fun ω ↦ R m ω.1) (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a m ω.1) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)))
      = (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)).map (fun ω ↦ R m ω.1) := by
    simp [condDistrib]
    <;> aesop
  rw [h2]
  have h3 : (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)).map (fun ω ↦ R m ω.1)
      = (P.map (A m)).comp ((P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)).map (fun ω ↦ A m ω.1)) := by
    have h4 : (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)).map (fun ω ↦ R m ω.1)
        = (P.map (fun ω ↦ R m ω.1 ∘ (fun ω ↦ A m ω.1))).comp (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)) := by
      simp [Measure.map_comp]
    have h5 : (P.map (fun ω ↦ R m ω.1 ∘ (fun ω ↦ A m ω.1))) = P.map (fun ω ↦ R m ω.1) := by
      congr 1
      fun_prop
    rw [h4, h5]
    <;> aesop
  rw [h3]
  have h4 : (P.map (A m)).comp ((P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)).map (fun ω ↦ A m ω.1))
      = (P.map (fun ω ↦ A m ω.1)).comp (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)) := by
    congr 1
    fun_prop
  rw [h4]
  have h5 : (P.map (fun ω ↦ A m ω.1)).comp (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))
      = (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)).map (fun ω ↦ A m ω.1) := by
    congr 1
    fun_prop
  rw [h5]
  have h6 : (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)).map (fun ω ↦ A m ω.1)
      = (P.map (A m)) := by
    simp [Measure.map_map, Measure.prod_prod, Measure.map_id, Measure.prod_prod]

  rw [h6]
  simp [Kernel.const_apply]
  <;> aesop
